content: By fine-tuning the intrinsic curiosity reward of an ICM-based 2025 autonomous agent to prioritize exploration of novel semantic embedding regions mapped by Sentence Transformers, we can build open-domain agents that actively seek out linguistically ambiguous or under-represented concepts to improve their world knowledge. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where the agent’s curiosity is guided directly by the semantic structure of unstructured natural language data it encounters.
